chart_specs.title: Figure 1: Insider Transaction Timeline by Economic Value
chart_specs.source_text: Source: NIKE Form 4 filings, FY2019. Values computed from NKE closing prices.

chart_specs.title: Figure 2: Top Beneficiaries by Economic Value
chart_specs.source_text: Source: NIKE Form 4 filings, FY2019. Stacked by: option spread | grant FMV | gift | transfer.

chart_specs.title: Figure 3: Filing Party Relationship Network
chart_specs.source_text: Source: NIKE Form 4 filings, FY2019. Edge weights = shared transaction count.

chart_specs.title: Figure 4: Economic Benefit Distribution by Insider
chart_specs.source_text: Source: NIKE Form 4 filings, FY2019. Area proportional to total economic benefit.

chart_specs.title: Figure 5: Transaction Cluster Analysis
chart_specs.source_text: Source: NIKE Form 4 filings, FY2019. Clusters = 3+ transactions within 3 business days.

chart_specs.title: Figure 6: Estimated Penalty Exposure Breakdown
chart_specs.source_text: Source: Statutory penalty calculations. Civil + criminal + disgorgement + treble damages.
